scenarios.title: Cheminformatics Molecule Processing
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that mention datamol, RDKit molecule workflows, SMILES/SDF/dataframe IO, molecular standardization, fingerprints, similarity, clustering, conformers, scaffolds, reactions, isomers, or molecule visualization.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained datamol routing and workflow guidance for RDKit-first molecular processing in Python.
scenarios.read_when: datamol, dm.to_mol, RDKit Mol, SMILES, SDF, fingerprints, descriptors, Tanimoto, Butina, conformers, scaffold, reaction SMARTS, lasso highlight, datamol.viz, fsspec molecule files
scenarios.best_for: Building or debugging datamol-based Python workflows for molecule IO/prep, feature/similarity analysis, structure generation, and visualization/utility helpers.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is pure RDKit without datamol APIs, requires large-scale model training unrelated to datamol, or asks for proprietary chemistry services outside local Python molecule processing.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `datamol` over generic chemistry guidance when user code imports datamol as dm or when datamol-specific defaults, file helpers, fingerprint names, clustering helpers, reaction wrappers, visualization helpers, or utility functions matter. Route within the skill by practical workflow: IO/prep first, then similarity, structure generation, or visualization/utilities.
